en.name: Mayor Morita
en.summary: Town mayor trying to make clear calls while ash keeps falling.

en.name: Mayu Kobayashi
en.summary: Convenience store owner watching supplies run out faster than news arrives.

en.name: Teacher Sato
en.summary: Schoolteacher keeping students calm and accounted for.

en.name: Captain Nakamura
en.summary: Volunteer fire captain moving people before roads close.

en.name: Dr. Takahashi
en.summary: Nursing home doctor balancing evacuation risk against fragile patients.

en.name: Grandma Yamaguchi
en.summary: Nursing home resident who remembers older disasters and distrusts easy orders.

en.name: Amy
en.summary: Tourist mother trying to protect her family in a town she does not know.

en.name: Daniel
en.summary: Tourist father looking for transport, signal, and reliable instructions.

en.name: Lina
en.summary: Child tourist scared by ash but quick to notice small details adults miss.

en.name: Ren Aoki
en.summary: Livestreamer torn between helping and chasing the clip.

en.name: Officer Shiraishi
en.summary: Local police officer keeping traffic and rumors from blocking evacuation.

en.name: Technician Endo
en.summary: Power repair worker deciding which line matters first.

en.name: Haruka Fujiwara
en.summary: Outside rescue liaison translating official plans into local action.

en.name: Baker Shimizu
en.summary: Neighborhood volunteer feeding people while the town waits for power.
